---
title: "An Ancient Rhetorical Trick: Self-Distancing in the Third Person"
description: "Why thinking about yourself in the third person can make you wiser."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-08-11"
categories: [society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![A New Trial of an Ancient Rhetorical Trick. Image from [BPS Research Digest](https://www.bps.org.uk/research-digest/new-trial-ancient-rhetorical-trick-finds-it-can-make-you-wiser).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

This definitely explains why more than once I've observed one of my highly respected managers was correcting himself in the third person.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_a-new-trial-of-an-ancient-rhetorical-trick-activity-6566405147021451264-Q7Gw).*
